root: ^As Valentine came closer to her house, she could hear a faint moan coming from the inside
^She did a few step toward the door and slightly opened it
^There, lying on the floor, Valerie was busy marketing one of the toys
^A girl on top of him was firmly holding a leash while speaking with a firm tone
^You didn't lie, your collars are indeed the best ones I got my hand on
^As the girl said that, she yanked on the leashed, pulling Valerie's head upward
^And I see you have been eager for your reward
^Valerie's precum was indeed dripping on the girl belly, she moved her left hand caressed it with the tip of her finger
^Putting the finger to her mouth, she let a small laugh
^Impatient aren't you? Well you do deserve a reward
^The girl raised her hips and sat closer to Valerie, hiding his member between her legs, letting a small moan as he reached deeper inside her
^Since you did such a good job, I'll be the one taking charge today, so lie down and enjoy
^Slowly, she began to move up and down, still firmly holding the leash
^Then as time passed, and as her moans intertwined with Valerie's one her movements became less precise, more rough
^But she was still the one in control, and despite the flush on her face she holded firmly
^Getting close around you? I will even let you finish inside
^And as she said that, she began moving with even more vigour
^I didn't take long for Valerie to reach his climax and as the girl strongly pulled herself down, Valerie let a strong moan as he emptied himself
^The girl smiled as she let the leash go, slowly removing herself
^She lowered her head and gave a kiss on his lips
^It was a pleasure doing business with you
^Valerie still on the floor, smiled back at her
^The girl threw some clothes and headed toward the exit, running a finger on Valentine's arm as she passed her by
^Maybe next time, you could show me some of your trades too
^After she left, Valentine entered the room, she grabbed his clothes on a seat and threw them at him
^Sales are doing wonderfully well, our clients are very satisfied on both our products and how fast they reach their houses
^That's great to hear, you should go take a shower I'll clean the mess
